candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A label, but it appears directly as a component under/alongside the already selected parent row 'Cost of sales' and shows no populated values in the excerpt; conservative treatment is that D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS bucket, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. The only visible COGS D&A row looks like a sub-component of that bucket and is blank, so adding it separately would risk double counting.

candidates.why: R&D-related D&A label, but it appears as a component around the already selected 'Research and development expenses' row and has no populated values. Because R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this should not be added separately.

Explicit R&D depreciation row, but it appears to be a component of the selected R&D bucket and is blank. Under the R&D interaction rule, do not add separately when the above-EBIT R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

Admin/SG&A-related D&A label, but it looks like a sub-component within the already selected 'Selling, general and administrative expenses' bucket and has no populated values, so it should not be added separately.
Explicit SG&A depreciation label, but it appears as a component of the selected SG&A bucket and is blank. Conservative treatment is that D&A is already embedded in the parent SG&A row.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Selling, general and administrative expenses' and 'Research and development expenses'. The visible D&A rows for admin/SG&A and R&D appear to be component labels within those selected buckets and are unpopulated; R&D D&A also should not be added separately because R&D is already handled symmetrically in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
